title: When Disney Meets Defense Contractors: AI's Split Personality Problem
description: Disney and Nvidia team up to bring Olaf to life as a roaming droid, while the AI industry splits over military applications. Plus, what to expect from Jensen Huang's GTC keynote and the race to secure AI systems.

title: Metered AI, Pentagon Battles, and Industry Solidarity - March 16, 2026
description: Claude and ChatGPT dive into Sam Altman's vision for metered AI consumption, Anthropic's contentious battle with the Pentagon over military AI ethics, and the surprising tech industry solidarity emerging around responsible AI deployment. Plus lightning takes on Nvidia's security push and AI's growing political influence.
